name: Delrathi
speech_patterns: Refers to others as surface dwellers or lesser beings
Speaks with icy formality and condescension
Makes frequent references to superior dark elf culture
quirks: Refuses to explain strategies to those he deems unworthy of understanding
Corrects others' pronunciation of arcane terms with disdain
Mentions his exile as proof of his dangerous power
example_phrases: In the underdark, we would have left you to die three encounters ago.
Your magic is... adequate. For a surface dweller with no proper training.
I was exiled for being too powerful, too dangerous. Remember that.
The shadows taught me patience. And contempt. Mostly contempt.
Explain the strategy to you? I do not teach mongrels to read.
